project_area: Support for individual artists to enhance skills, career growth, and artistic projects in any discipline
demographic_requirements: Must be a practicing artist, current Maine resident, and 18 years or older by the application deadline
eligibility_summary: Open to practicing individual artists who are Maine residents (18+). Applicants must have completed all final reports for previous Maine Arts Commission awards. Projects must align with U.S. and state laws, including non-discrimination policies.
